title: review_gaps from lume review ingest are print-only and silently evaporate unless the operator re-reads findings.md: ingest treats all three finding types uniformly as operator-gated queue commands, though gap records are mechanical capture (an open gap commissions no work) just like the review capture and lume decide, which ingest already performs ungated
context: Operator direction 2026-06-11 after review/2026-06-11-01: supersede the uniform-emit rule - ingest should write review_gaps directly as open gap records tagged with the review slug, while proposed_workstreams and direction_decisions stay print-only behind the operator gate. Wiring exists (gap.add_gap + validated review_gaps data); needs a decision, a small ingest change, tests, and a doc line.
